Event: Autumn Festival 2024
Event Date: 09/01/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: M4
Emperor's Defender Mace

When attacking, has a 30-33% chance of stunning an enemy for 2,5 sec.
Once in a while, removes armor from 3 random enemies. They lose 45% armor stats and can't use armor abilities for 4 seconds. After the target's armor is returned, the targets of the ability are scared for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
